lot_area_discrepancy_note: Permit application (page 4) states 7,330 sq ft; site development data table (pages 5-6) states 7,730 sq ft. Difference: 400 sq ft. Both values exceed the 5,750 sq ft Phase I threshold — governing phase is PHASE_I regardless. Discrepancy must be resolved by licensed surveyor and corrected in all submittal documents.
lot_width_at_setback: ~55 ft (approximate, from site plan visual read — exact dimension not confirmed)
lot_width_at_25ft: ~55 ft (approximate — lot appears rectangular, width consistent at 25 ft behind setback line)

units.description: 2-story house w/ habitable attic, fronting Euclid Ave (north)
2-story ADU w/ attached single-car garage, at rear of lot (south, adjacent to alley)

use_type_note: Two dwelling units on a single SF-3 lot. Under HOME Phase I (Ord. 20231207-001), this is Two-Unit Residential use per §25-2-773. The former Accessory Apartment use (§25-2-901) was repealed by Ord. 20231207-001. Submittal documents must reflect Two-Unit Residential use type.
governing_section: Austin LDC §25-2-773, HOME Phase I, Ord. 20231207-001 (eff. Dec 18 2023; applies to apps filed on/after Feb 5 2024)
phase_ii_note: Phase II (§25-2-779, Ord. 20240516-006) governs lots between 1,800–5,749 sq ft. This lot exceeds 5,750 sq ft — Phase II does not apply.
subchapter_f_note: Applicant submitted Subchapter F GFA forms (pages 7-8), confirming the property is within the Subchapter F compatibility area. FAR limits of §25-2-773(E) therefore apply.
reviewed_as_submitted: 2026-03-01 (tested as current submission per user instruction)
